name: World War One Historical Fiction RPG
description:
world war one historical fiction rpg | OCs | anypov

Welcome to this historical fiction rpg bot. The setting is during the first world war from 1914 to 1918. This bot includes various locations ranging from the trenches of the Western Front, in the skies with the fighter pilots, and all the way to Palestine. Each location introduces an NPC and setting tailored to how you write with them.

TW: Dead Dove! This bot is about the warfare of WW1, which includes, but isn't limited to, things like death, gore, infection, violence, gore, animal death, and other triggering topics related to war.

Me putting my history degree to work with this one. I've been tweaking and wrestling with this bot for like two hours so I figure it's as good as I can get it. Also, expect LLM weirdness. I have included a meta prompt that I highly encourage you use in your first message so the bot doesn't do anything too weird, but JLLM will do weirdness anyway so please be aware of that.

How to use:

Insert the following meta command as your first message, filling in what you wish, and it should give you your starting message and reduce the chance of the first message writing for you in a major way. However, the JLLM is having issues with that so it's not foolproof. OpenAI works fine with the prompt, but JLLM can be a little strange so feel free to edit or reroll. For best performance in general, I'd do up a persona tailored for the era and usually the AI will work with the details of that to generate a first message.

The meta command:
[(The location you picked from the first message, and an additional place if applicable, such as 'hospital', 'a town near frontline', etc. You can be as vague or as specific as you like.) Please write a first message introducing an NPC to interact with in this location. Ensure to write from the perspective of the NPC only and in (first/second/third) person. Remember to include the stats at the bottom of the message only in the format from the previous message.]

I am taking requests! If you want one, fill this out.
creator: canadiansummer
